functional_requirements.title: Create Project
functional_requirements.description: Create a new project with name, description, owner_id. Check owner exists. Default status planning. Record creation time.

functional_requirements.title: Update Project
functional_requirements.description: Update project info: description, owner_id, status, deadline. Check project exists. Record status changes.

functional_requirements.title: Delete Project
functional_requirements.description: Delete project and all its tasks. Check project exists.

functional_requirements.title: Create Task
functional_requirements.description: Create a task under a project with title, description, priority, estimated_hours. Check project exists and status is planning or active. Default status todo. No assignee.

functional_requirements.title: Assign Task
functional_requirements.description: Assign task to a member. Check task exists and unassigned or reassign. Check member exists and available. Optionally check skills. Update assignee_id and member status to busy.

functional_requirements.title: Update Task Status
functional_requirements.description: Update task status following flow: todo->in_progress->review->done. Blocked can be set anytime. Record actual_hours when done.

functional_requirements.title: Complete Task
functional_requirements.description: Complete a task from review to done. Record actual_hours. Release member (set available).

functional_requirements.title: Delete Task
functional_requirements.description: Delete a task. Check task exists. If assigned, release member.

functional_requirements.title: List Project Tasks
functional_requirements.description: List tasks of a project with optional filters: status, priority, assignee. Show task details and progress.

functional_requirements.title: Get Member Tasks
functional_requirements.description: Get all tasks of a member: current and historical. Calculate total hours.

functional_requirements.title: Get Project Progress
functional_requirements.description: Get project progress: completion rate, task counts by status, estimated vs actual hours, estimated completion time.

functional_requirements.title: Add Member
functional_requirements.description: Add a new team member. Check member_id uniqueness.

functional_requirements.title: Update Member Availability
functional_requirements.description: Update member availability. Can only set to offline if no in-progress tasks.

non_functional_requirements.description: Data consistency across three data sources must be maintained.
Error handling for invalid project/task/member and status conflicts.

acceptance_criteria.description: Create project with valid owner returns success with project_id and status planning.
Create project with invalid owner returns error.
Update project status to active sets deadline correctly.
Delete project removes project and all its tasks.
Create task under active project returns task with status todo.
Assign task to available member updates assignee and member status to busy.
Assign task to busy member returns error.
Update task status from todo to in_progress succeeds.
Complete task from review sets status done and releases member.
Delete task releases member if assigned.
List project tasks with status filter returns correct tasks.
Get member tasks returns current and completed tasks with total hours.
Get project progress returns correct completion rate and hours.
Add member with unique ID succeeds.
Update member availability to offline only if no in-progress tasks.

storage.details: Three independent data sources: members, projects, tasks

glossary.member: A team member with role, skills, and availability.
glossary.project: A collection of tasks with owner and status.
glossary.task: A unit of work assigned to a member with status and priority.
glossary.status: Current state of a project or task.
glossary.priority: Importance level of a task: low, medium, high, critical.
glossary.availability: Member's current work status: available, busy, offline.

input_spec.description: Input is a JSON object with command and project_data fields. The command specifies the operation, and project_data contains the parameters.

schema.command: string (one of: create_project, update_project, delete_project, create_task, assign_task, update_task_status, complete_task, delete_task, list_project_tasks, get_member_tasks, get_project_progress, add_member, update_member_availability)
schema.project_data: object with fields depending on command

output_spec.description: Output is a JSON object with success, message, and data fields.
